observed_weaknesses: Source-level quality fields were implemented and rendered, but the Markdown source table contract did not have a dedicated regression test.
A future edit could remove the Avg Quality or Weak columns while Rust tests still passed through broader scan coverage.

selected_candidate.name: Markdown source-quality contract test
selected_candidate.reason: Pin the source coverage export format that agents and reports can consume.
selected_candidate.success_metric: cargo test includes a passing markdown_source_coverage_includes_quality_triage test.

safety_controls: The test uses synthetic source summary data only.
clippy was rerun after adding the test.
